rules.section: Personal Information Protection Act, s.19 (sensitive personal information)
rules.reason: BC PIPA requires consent for collection, use and disclosure of personal information by private organisations, with limited statutory exceptions. Disclosure without consent or a recognised exception is a contravention.
rules.remediation_hint: Specify the consent mechanism (express/implied/opt-out) and document an applicable PIPA exception if consent is not relied on.

rules.section: Builders Lien Act, s.4 (10% statutory holdback)
rules.reason: BC Builders Lien Act fixes a 10% statutory holdback that may not be waived; release follows certification + lien-period rules.
rules.remediation_hint: Maintain a 10% holdback per the Act; release follows substantial completion and the 55-day lien period.
